_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Chad Tracy is trying to fix a big problem with the Red Sox
items.snark: Tracy introducing ABS practice because Sox hitters challenge strikes like drunk guys arguing with bouncers.

items.headline: Pete Alonso helps highlight Red Sox Fenway woes with homer
items.snark: Polar Bear crushes one at Fenway wearing an Orioles uniform, a sight John Henry will see in his nightmares.

items.headline: Orioles 4, Red Sox 2: Ignominious inefficiencies continue at Fenway Park
items.snark: Sox now 9-20 at Fenway, worst home start in 94 years, but sure let's blame vibes instead of hitting.

items.headline: Red Sox have actually had a few things go right in 2026
items.snark: Writer forced to dig through rubble to find positives, discovers defense is first in DRS and promptly weeps.

items.headline: Red Sox Minor Lines: Kyson Witherspoon goes five scoreless
items.snark: Finally a Sox pitcher who can locate the zone, shame he's in Single-A and not Fenway.

items.headline: A.J. Brown draws comparison to franchise legend from Josh McDaniels
items.snark: McDaniels sees Gronk in AJ Brown's game, which is either genius scouting or he's been drinking the Foxboro Kool-Aid.

items.headline: Up-and-coming coach explains decision to stay with Patriots
items.snark: Assistant coach stays with Pats despite better offers elsewhere, probably got promised free Dunkin for life.
